status: frozen candidate selected after seed0 minimal feature ablation; not pre-declared blind model

ema_equations.index_ema: EMA_t = alpha * EMA_{t-1} + (1-alpha) * x_t, alpha=exp(-1/tau_index), EMA_0=x_0

r0_vcorr_preprocessing.r0_source: median dV/dI events from train profiles only, by temperature
r0_vcorr_preprocessing.v_corr_raw: causal time EMA of V_raw - I_raw*R0(T), tau=120s
r0_vcorr_preprocessing.temperature_specific_r0_caveat: test temperature selects the corresponding train-derived R0(T)

label_construction.formula: SOC_CC_unclipped = SOC0_OCV_inferred(file) - Q_removed(Ah) / Q_ref_lc_ocv_Ah(temperature); SOC_CC = clip(SOC_CC_unclipped, 0, 1)
label_construction.soc0_source: OCV-inferred per-file start-SOC manifest generated during preprocessing; raw manifest is not bundled in this release.
label_construction.note: SOC labels are supervised targets/evaluation labels, not model inputs.

strict_no_cc.current_usage: instantaneous and finite-memory causal input, not integrated into a SOC state

exploratory_fuds_use.paper_wording: candidate requiring frozen confirmation, not a pre-declared blind model
